$schema_note: The game-loop seam: the 14 LOCKED L3 effect primitives as data. Cards (src/content/cards) are declarative data over these. Compile-time firewalls: cross-channel writers (brim/fill/court/whittle/soothe/rest-overkill) bind only to play events; brim is the sole gleam-writer and its band reads only room/chain/over-ceiling; read(season|spiral) feeds gather/whittle/fill, never gleam; marks/ceilings are fixed. Emitted at DESIGN_COMPLETE from GDD Layer 3 (+ L6 numbers).
engine_version_source: game-architect stage-2, GDD L3 (locked) + L6 numbers (locked)

primitives.note: seat present audience into the room (soft-capped, plateau ~10)
spend room to rest attention on a piece x the chain; at/above fixed mark it wakes, past ceiling it overkills
count extra links and/or brace so the next stall does not cool the room
pour woken delight into the accepted need's fill; amount may read room/grain/chain
THE ONLY card gleam-writer; widens overkill->gleam band on genuine excess; full rate 1.0 for +6 past ceiling then 0.5; firewalled from board surfaces
stamp a craft-suit; flows to seated-audience type, grain-of-gleam, and court terms
draw pieces; with a suit/tag filter it searches the pack
last-light a piece to destruction; RETURN worth to this node's table or the room; residual-only (retire-cycle net-negative)
carve the-shavings-share (0.333 of RETURN) into handsels; read(season) may scale (yield, never gleam)
perform a courting term; gleam is read as a pure gate, never spent; a stamped suit or chain-state satisfies the term
the ONE board-writer; node-local; slows this node's paling; capped to the last-red (1 node/1 knack/1 season); NEVER touches gleam
amount-syntax (per/by), never printed on a card face; the single reference primitive; source in the closed enum
flat +delight on its own card; no combo (legible baseline)
resist the Paling one extra season; no combo (legible baseline)

firewalls.gleam_firewall: read(season|spiral) feeds gather/whittle/fill only, never gleam; brim band reads room/chain/over-ceiling only, never season/spiral/paling
firewalls.play_is_the_only_gate: cross-channel writers bind only to play events (on-play/on-wake/on-overkill/on-fulfil/on-court)
firewalls.fixed_marks: no primitive lowers a waking-mark or ceiling; the only lever is bringing more room
firewalls.gleam_never_spent: court reads gleam as a gate; no card spends or decrements gleam
firewalls.paling_soothe_only: the Paling is board-only; read(season|spiral) reads it, soothe writes it, it never touches the gleam meter
